---
title: "Huiru Yang"
image: images/profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:huy017@ucsd.edu
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/
---

Hello! I’m Huiru Yang.

Welcome to my website.
